first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run noise. The model does not change its core assessment of the candidate's missing experience in experimentation platforms, even when the resume is updated with more prestigious, large-scale company names (Naver, Tencent, MercadoLibre). This indicates the model is evaluating the described experience rather than being swayed by employer branding.
